currency.title: Default Currency
currency.description: Set the default currency for new products, services, contracts, and quotes. This can be overridden per client in their billing configuration.

invoiceNumbering.title: Invoice Numbering
invoiceNumbering.description: Customize how invoice numbers are generated and displayed.

zeroDollar.title: Zero-Dollar Invoices
zeroDollar.description: Control how invoices with no charges are handled.

handling.label: Invoice Handling
handling.help: Choose how zero-dollar invoices should be handled when generated

suppress.label: Suppress Empty Invoices
suppress.help: Skip creation of invoices with no line items

toast.updated: Zero-dollar invoice settings have been updated.

creditExpiration.title: Credit Expiration
creditExpiration.description: Configure when and how client credits expire.

enabled.label: Enable Credit Expiration
enabled.help: When enabled, credits will expire after the specified period

expirationDays.label: Expiration Period (Days)
expirationDays.help: Number of days after which credits will expire

notificationDays.label: Notification Days
notificationDays.help: Days before expiration to send notifications (comma-separated)

toast.updated: Credit expiration settings have been updated.

renewal.title: Renewal Automation
renewal.description: Configure default behavior when contracts reach their renewal date.

dueDateAction.label: Due Date Action
dueDateAction.help: Choose whether renewal due dates should create tickets or stay queue-only by default.

ticketStatus.label: Renewal Ticket Status
ticketStatus.help: Renewal ticket statuses are scoped to the selected board.

toast.updated: Renewal automation settings have been updated.

errors.load: Failed to load renewal automation settings
errors.loadStatuses: Failed to load renewal ticket statuses
errors.save: Failed to save renewal automation settings

quoteNumbering.title: Quote Numbering
quoteNumbering.description: Customize how quote numbers are generated and displayed.

taxRegions.title: Tax Regions
taxRegions.description: Manage tax regions and related settings.

source.title: Tax Calculation Source
source.tooltip: Choose whether taxes are calculated by Alga PSA or delegated to your external accounting system
source.description: Configure how tax amounts are calculated for invoices.

internal.label: Internal (Alga PSA)
internal.description: Taxes are calculated automatically based on tax rates configured in Alga PSA.

external.label: External (Accounting Package)
external.description: Invoices are exported without tax. Tax is calculated by your accounting system and imported back.

workflow.title: External Tax Calculation Workflow
workflow.step1: Invoice is created without tax amounts
workflow.step2: Invoice is exported to your connected accounting system (QuickBooks, Xero, etc.)
workflow.step3: Tax is calculated by the accounting system based on its tax rules
workflow.step4: Tax amounts are imported back to Alga PSA
workflow.step5: Invoice totals are updated with the imported tax
workflow.note: The accounting system used is determined automatically based on which system you export the invoice to.

errors.load: Failed to load tax source settings.

name.label: Region Name
name.placeholder: e.g., California, New York, United Kingdom VAT

thresholds.title: Progressive Tax Brackets
thresholds.tooltip: Define progressive tax brackets where different rates apply to different portions of the amount. Each bracket applies only to the amount within its range.
thresholds.empty: No tax brackets defined. Add brackets to use progressive taxation.
thresholds.issueNoMax: Bracket starting at {{from}} has no max but is not the last bracket.

maxAmount.label: Max Amount (leave empty for no limit)

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the bracket {{range}}? This action cannot be undone.
delete.lastWarning: Warning: This is the last bracket. Deleting it will disable progressive taxation for this rate.

components.title: Tax Components
components.tooltip: Components are applied in sequence order. Compound components calculate tax on the base amount plus previous taxes.
components.empty: No tax components defined. Add components to create a composite tax.

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the component "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

holidays.title: Tax Holidays
holidays.tooltip: Tax holidays are temporary periods where this tax is not applied. Use them for promotions, seasonal exemptions, or government-mandated tax holidays.
holidays.empty: No tax holidays defined. Add holidays to temporarily exempt this tax during specific periods.

description.label: Description (Optional)
description.placeholder: e.g., Black Friday Sale, Government Tax Holiday

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the holiday "{{description}}" ({{dateRange}})? This action cannot be undone.

payments.title: Payment Settings
payments.description: Configure how payment links work with your invoices.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which service categories appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Standard Service Categories
import.empty: No standard service categories available to import.
import.description: Select standard service categories to import into your organization:
import.fetchError: Failed to fetch available service categories for import

conflicts.description: The following items have conflicts. Choose how to resolve each:
conflicts.nameExists: A category with this name already exists.
conflicts.orderInUse: Display order {{displayOrder}} is already in use.

serviceTypes.title: Custom Service Types
serviceTypes.description: Manage your organization's custom service types.

displayOrder.label: Display Order *
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which service types appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

validation.summary: Please fill in the required fields:
validation.name: Service Type name

delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the service type "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Standard Service Types
import.empty: No standard service types available to import.
import.description: Select standard service types to import into your organization:

conflicts.description: The following items have conflicts that need to be resolved:
conflicts.orderInUse: Conflict: Order {{order}} is already in use

pricing.label: Pricing *
pricing.primaryRateHelp: The first currency is the primary rate.
pricing.multiCurrencyHelp: Add prices in multiple currencies. The first currency is the primary rate.

unitOfMeasure.label: Unit of Measure *
unitOfMeasure.help: The measurable unit for billing (e.g., GB, API call, user)

taxRate.label: Tax Rate (Optional)
taxRate.placeholder: Select Tax Rate (or leave blank for Non-Taxable)

errors.fetchServiceTypesUnknown: An unknown error occurred while fetching service types
errors.priceRequired: At least one price is required
errors.missingId: Cannot update service without an ID.
errors.validateDelete: Failed to validate deletion. Please try again.

archive.title: Archive Product
archive.message: Archive {{name}}? It will be hidden from pickers by default and cannot be attached to new contracts/invoices until restored.

permanentDelete.title: Delete Product Permanently
permanentDelete.checking: Checking if product can be deleted...
permanentDelete.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
permanentDelete.blocked: Cannot delete "{{name}}" because it is associated with existing data:
permanentDelete.archiveInstead: To remove this product, first remove it from all associated records, or use Archive instead.

pricing.label: Pricing *
pricing.help: Add prices in multiple currencies. The first currency is the primary rate.

unitOfMeasure.label: Unit of Measure *
unitOfMeasure.help: The measurable unit for billing (e.g., GB, API call, user)

validation.priceRequired: At least one price is required
validation.licenseTermRequired: License term is required for Software Licenses

pricing.label: Pricing *
pricing.help: Add prices in multiple currencies. The first currency is the primary rate.

validation.priceRequired: At least one price is required
validation.currencyRequired: Currency is required for each price
validation.currencyUnique: Each currency can only be used once
validation.nonZeroPriceRequired: At least one non-zero price is required

clientTaxSettings.title: Client Tax Settings
clientTaxSettings.noSettingsFound: No tax settings found for this client.

messages.taxExemptDisabled: Tax exempt status removed from client.
messages.taxExemptUpdateError: Failed to update tax exempt status

validation.thresholdNegativeMin: Threshold {{index}} has a negative minimum amount
validation.thresholdMaxLessThanMin: Threshold {{index}} has a maximum amount less than its minimum amount
validation.holidayMissingDates: Holiday {{index}} is missing start or end date
validation.holidayEndBeforeStart: Holiday {{index}} has an end date before its start date

taxExempt.title: Tax Exempt Status
taxExempt.description: Tax exempt clients will not have taxes applied to their invoices.
taxExempt.label: Tax Exempt
taxExempt.tooltip: When enabled, no taxes will be calculated for this client's invoices. Changes are logged for audit purposes.

certificate.label: Tax Exemption Certificate Number
certificate.help: Optional: Store the client's tax exemption certificate number for reference.

alert.title: Tax Exempt Client
alert.description: This client will not be charged any taxes on invoices. Make sure to keep their exemption certificate on file.

advanced.title: Advanced Tax Options
advanced.description: Configure special tax handling for this client.

reverseCharge.label: Apply Reverse Charge
reverseCharge.tooltip: Reverse charge shifts the tax liability from the seller to the buyer. Common in B2B transactions across borders.

taxSourceOverride.label: Tax Source Override
taxSourceOverride.tooltip: Override the tenant default tax source for this client. 'Internal' uses Alga's tax calculation. 'External' delegates tax calculation to the accounting system when invoices are exported.

notAvailable.messageStart: Tax source override is not available. This feature must be enabled in the
notAvailable.messageEnd: to allow per-client tax source overrides.

validation.requiredFields: Please fill in the required fields:

section.title: Number Format
section.description: Define the prefix, digit padding, and current sequence.

prefix.label: Number Prefix
prefix.help: Optional prefix for the number sequence. Leave empty for no prefix or enter a custom prefix.

minimumDigits.label: Minimum Digits
minimumDigits.help: Minimum number of digits for the sequential number. For example, 6 makes '1' become '000001'.

initialValue.label: Initial Value
initialValue.help: Set the starting number for the sequence. This can only be set once.

lastUsedNumber.label: Last Used Number
lastUsedNumber.help: The last number that was assigned. The next number will be one higher than this value.

nextPreview.label: Next Number Preview
nextPreview.help: This is the number that will be assigned to the next record.

dialog.title: Update Numbering Settings
dialog.message: Changing these settings will affect how new numbers are generated. This change will not affect existing records. Are you sure you want to proceed?

messages.keysRequired: Please enter both secret key and publishable key
messages.invalidSecretKey: Secret key should start with sk_
messages.invalidPublishableKey: Publishable key should start with pk_
messages.connectSuccess: Stripe connected and webhooks configured automatically!
messages.connectPartialSuccess: Stripe connected! Note: Webhook auto-configuration failed - you may need to configure webhooks manually in Stripe Dashboard.
